---
title: Scientific events
excerpt: "A list of selected talks I have given"
toc-location: right
page-layout: full
---

## Upcoming events:

-  [International Conference on Statistics and Data Science ICSDS 2024 ](https://sites.google.com/view/ims-icsds2024/), Nice, France, December 2024. Contribution: *Dependency aware shrinkage priors.*

- [7th Joint Statistical Meeting of the Deutsche Arbeitsgemeinschaft Statistik DAGStat 2025](https://dagstat2025.de/#), Berlin, Germany, March 2025. Tutorial: *One-day Bayesian Data Analysis Workshop.* Instructors: Javier Aguilar, [Luna Fazio](https://lunafazio.github.io).

## Past events:
 
-   [Bayesian Methods for the Social Sciences II](https://bayesforshs2.sciencesconf.org), Amsterdam, Netherlands, October 2024. Poster: *Generalized Decomposition priors on R2.* 
 
-   [ISBA World Meeting 2024](https://www.unive.it/web/en/2208/home), Venice, Italy. Poster: *Generalized Decomposition priors on R2.* (Accepted, but did not attend)

-   [Bernoulli-*ims* 11th World Congress in Probability and Statistics 2024](https://www.bernoulli-ims-worldcongress2024.org), Bochum, Germany. Contributed Talk: *Generalized Decomposition priors on R2.* (Accepted, but did not attend)

-   [International Conference on Multilevel Analysis 2024](https://multilevel.fss.uu.nl), Utrecht, Netherlands. Contributed Talk: *Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models*.

-   [NordStat 2023](https://nordstat2023.org), Gothenburg, Sweden. Contributed Talk: *Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models*.

-   [BayesComp 2023](https://bayescomp2023.com/home), Levi, Finland. Poster: *Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models*.

-   German Probability and Statistics Days (GPSD) 2023, Essen, Germany. Contributed Talk: *Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models*.

-   [International Conference on Statistics and Data Science ICSDS 2022 ](https://sites.google.com/view/icsds2022) , Florence, Italy 2022. Invited Talk: *Intuitive Joint Priors for Bayesian Multilevel Models*. [Student travel award](https://imstat.org/2022/12/06/2022-icsds-travel-award-recipients/) given by the IMS.
